kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: The artisan in Eastcheap's levy is higher than both Beatrix and the Fletcher.
Wulfric's levy is higher than both the Mason and the artisan in Millpond.
More members of the Clothiers' Guild are in the Hill Ward than members of the Ironmongers' Guild.
The Potter does not belong to the South Side if and only if Aldric goes with Fletcher.
Between Carpenter and 7 coins, one goes with Highrow and the other with Millpond.
Blacksmith goes with at least two of Aldric, Oldwall, and 13 coins.
More members of the River Ward are in the Joiners' Guild than members of the Hill Ward.
Highrow goes with exactly one of Godfrey, Blacksmith, or 11 coins.
Exactly one of these is true: Rowan goes with Potter; Fletcher goes with 11 coins; Mason goes with 9 coins.
Rowan's levy is at most 3 coins away from the artisan in Highrow.
Someone in the North Side goes with Beatrix if and only if Carpenter goes with Godfrey.
Between Tanner and Riverside, one goes with Aldric and the other with Cedric.
15 coins goes with at most one of Wulfric, Carpenter, and Eastcheap.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: The angler at Birchpool's weight is higher than both Cody and the angler who landed the Carp.
Wade's weight is higher than both the angler who landed the Catfish and the angler at Grayreach.
More members of the Sunfish Family are in the East Watershed than members of the Pike Family.
The angler who landed the Perch does not belong to the North Watershed if and only if Boone goes with Carp.
Between Bluegill and 5 lb, one goes with Cedarmere and the other with Grayreach.
Bass goes with at least two of Boone, Pinehollow, and 8 lb.
More members of the North Watershed are in the Catfish Family than members of the East Watershed.
Cedarmere goes with exactly one of Esther, Bass, or 7 lb.
Exactly one of these is true: Royce goes with Perch; Carp goes with 7 lb; Catfish goes with 6 lb.
Royce's weight is at most 1 lb away from the angler at Cedarmere.
Someone in the Lowland Basin goes with Cody if and only if Bluegill goes with Esther.
Between Trout and Stillwater, one goes with Boone and the other with Dale.
9 lb goes with at most one of Wade, Bluegill, and Birchpool.
